name: Scratch Golf Club
about: Scratch Golf Club is a private, members-only facility in Dallas offering elite golf simulation and training services. The venue is equipped with tour-grade technology including Trackman simulators, AI swing analysis, and slow-motion video capabilities. Membership provides unlimited access 24/7/365 through a mobile app, with digital keys for entry. The facility caters to serious golfers looking to improve their skills with comprehensive data tracking and various practice modes.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-grade Trackman simulators with 30+ data points
24/7 unlimited access with mobile app digital entry
Comprehensive swing analysis with AI and slow-motion video
Multiple practice modes for every type of player
Professional coaching available with 10% discount for members

food_and_drink.notes: Members are allowed to bring their own food to enjoy during their reservation
Members are allowed to bring their own alcohol to enjoy during their reservation

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor providing comprehensive ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided or if members must bring their own.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Scratch Golf Club does not provide food or alcohol but allows members to bring their own to enjoy during their reservation.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide information on the average time required to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, Scratch Golf Club is a private, members-only facility that does not appear to cater to children or families.
